title: microsorum sessile
intro: Microsorum sessile, also known as the Rock Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Microsorum sessile include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
